_comment: S3 DT Offset — Gage R&R for timing offset (DT) response (STUDY-SPEC §6).
name: DT offset
description: 9 parts × 2 appraisers × 3 trials. (STUDY-SPEC §6 states 10 steps; the notation −2.0,−1.5,…,+2.0 at 0.5 s resolution yields 9 distinct values.) Drives: DT R&R.
harness_note: Negative DT means the transmitter fires before the nominal slot boundary. The harness must schedule playback DT seconds early relative to the slot start; the synthesiser modulate() offset is clamped to 0 for negative values and the timing must be enforced at the playback layer.
